The '''VCX-700 heavy courier''' was a 26-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long armed [[Courier/Legends|courier]] produced by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. Like the rest of the [[VCX series/Legends|VCX series]], the VCX-700 was equipped as standard with near-military grade engines, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], and weapons.<ref name="G2" />

Unlike the earlier [[VCX-350 light freighter]], the VCX-700 sacrificed cargo capacity for armament, and was equipped with a dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret, four [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], an [[autoblaster]], and four [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. It could only carry five tons of cargo, but its strong armament and heavy armor plating made it well-suited to protecting VIP passengers. The VCX-700's hull configuration superficially resembled the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]], with engines mounted above and behind a hemispherical main hull, while other aspects of the design resemble the [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray''-class]] in its landed configuration, such as the loading ramp beneath the tail section, the tail mounted cannon and the top silhouette.<ref name="G2" />
